auth.loginSubtitle: Access your account and continue your care journey.
auth.newPatientSubtitle: Create an account to book appointments and manage your health.
auth.staffLoginPrompt: Are you a doctor or staff member? Use your staff credentials.
auth.validationError: Please enter your username or email and password.
auth.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
auth.verifyEmailLinkBeforeLogin: Please open the verification link we sent to your email before logging in.
auth.forgotSuccess: If the email exists, a reset link has been sent.
auth.checkEmailReset: Check your email for a password reset link.
auth.resetSubtitle: Set a new password with your token
auth.verifySubtitle: Enter the 6-digit verification code sent to your email
auth.verifyLinkSubtitle: We are confirming your MedSphere email verification link.
auth.verifyLinkFailed: This verification link is invalid or expired.
auth.resendSubtitle: Request a fresh email verification link
auth.emailVerifiedCanLogin: Email verified successfully. You can now log in.
auth.checkEmailVerification: If the email exists and is not verified, a new verification link has been sent.
auth.verifyInvalidOrExpired: This verification link or code is invalid or expired.
auth.verifyEmailBeforeLogin: Please verify your email before logging in.
auth.emailValidationError: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.appointmentPrefillNotice: Appointment details were carried into this registration form.
auth.registrationSuccessVerify: Registration successful. Open the verification link sent to your email before logging in.
auth.registrationCheckEmailLink: Registration successful. We sent a MedSphere verification link to your email. Open that link to confirm your account, then you can log in.
auth.registrationFailed: Registration failed. Please review your details and try again.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters.
auth.passwordTooLong: Password must be 100 characters or fewer.
auth.passwordNeedsUppercase: Password must include an uppercase letter.
auth.passwordNeedsLowercase: Password must include a lowercase letter.
auth.passwordNeedsSpecial: Password must include a special character.
auth.fixFormErrors: Please fix the highlighted fields and try again.
auth.unauthorizedDescription: You must sign in to continue.
auth.forbiddenDescription: You do not have permission to access this area.
auth.changePasswordSubtitle: Update your password for this account.
auth.otherSessionsSignedOut: Other active sessions were signed out.
auth.changePasswordFailed: We couldn't change your password. Please verify your current password and try again.
auth.changePasswordUnauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again before changing your password.
auth.usersSubtitle: Search and create user or staff identity accounts
auth.selectRolesHelp: Choose one or more roles for this account.
auth.createStaffAccountSubtitle: Create an identity account for a staff member or user.
auth.userCreatedSuccess: User created successfully. A temporary password was emailed directly to the user.
auth.userCreateFailed: We couldn't create the user account. Please review the details and try again.
